oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Money MOOves to make
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: (Budzinski) Satkowiak, Anne
oai_dc:dc.dc:subject: personal
finance
budget
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: As a new veterinarian joining the work force, there are many changes that affect one’s life – new title, new home, new co­workers, new financial status and many more. Having a fi­nancial foundation in place is crucial for future success as well as peace of mind. There are several different categories to consider when we’re talking about setting up our financial foundation. We will discuss financial plan modifications, debt, retirement plans, saving/investing and insurances within this financial health conversation. We will scratch the surface to allow you to do your research into what is most important and beneficial to you.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; Vol. 58 No. 2 (2025): 2025 AABP Annual Conference Proceedings; 167-170
